prompt: Add request logging middleware for Express

turns.content:
<task>
Add a request logging middleware for Express that logs method, path, status code, and response time.
</task>

arguments.summary: Read src/middleware/cors.ts for reference — standard Express middleware pattern with (req, res, next). Need to create logger.ts in same directory with response time tracking using res.on('finish').

next_steps.description: Create src/middleware/logger.ts with request logging middleware

arguments.content:
export { cors } from './cors';
export { requestLogger } from './logger';

turns.content:
PASS src/middleware/__tests__/cors.test.ts
PASS src/middleware/__tests__/logger.test.ts
  requestLogger
    ✓ logs method and path (5 ms)
    ✓ logs status code (3 ms)
    ✓ logs response time (2 ms)
    ✓ calls next (1 ms)

Tests: 7 passed, 7 total
Time: 1.8s

arguments.summary: Created src/middleware/logger.ts with requestLogger middleware. Uses Date.now() for timing and res.on('finish') to log after response completes. Format: 'METHOD /path STATUS TIMEms'. Exported from index.ts. All 7 tests pass (3 cors + 4 logger).
arguments.final_answer: Added request logging middleware in src/middleware/logger.ts. Logs method, path, status code, and response time in ms. Exported from middleware/index.ts. All 7 tests pass.
